rule_text: AP Government appropriations LAPSE at the close of the financial year (31st March); a Government servant must not transfer unexpended appropriation to a deposit/other head or draw it into a cash chest to prevent lapse OR for use after year-end; no undue rush of expenditure during March is permissible.
verification_method: For year-end procurement spikes (March): require justification + ensure no advance-deposit-of-funds maneuver to defer lapsing
